calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Aug-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Morgan Wahler for Linda Recchio, Administrator (via Zoom).

Ms. Wahler informed the Court that she had recently been retained by Ms. Recchio but has not yet filed a Substitution of Attorney. The Court inquired whether Ms. Wahler had reviewed the tentative ruling, and she confirmed that she had. With respect to the status of the final distribution petition, Ms. Wahler stated that it should be filed within the next month and requested a 30-day continuance to allow time to finalize the petition.

The Court asked whether the former attorney had been paid from estate funds. Ms. Wahler confirmed that the former attorney had not been paid from the estate but had instead been paid directly by Ms. Recchio.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to August 19, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Ms. Wahler was directed to file a Substitution of Attorney prior to the next calling of the case.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Continued To Jul-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Linda Recchio, in propria persona, Administrator, with Judith Recchio (daughter) assisting Linda Recchio.

At the court's query, Judith Recchio reports of having filed a Status Report which was subsequently rejected as she had included the date for today's hearing in the caption but has since resubmitted a new petition. The court advises Judith that it appears her recently submitted petition has also been rejected and she will need to submit a new petition accordingly. Judith reports of having filed a signature authorization to endorse documents on behalf of her mother. There is discussion re whether there is a plan to hire an attorney to assist the Administrator with this matter. The Administrator reports that she is the Beneficiary of the Estate.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Jul-08-2025 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Judith Recchio, daughter to Linda Recchio, Administrator (via Zoom).

Judith Recchio reported that her mother, who is 87 years old, was unable to attend but authorized her to appear. She explained that her mother was unaware of the requirement to file documents to close the estate and had recently asked for assistance. Ms. Recchio stated that she attempted to file an Inventory and Appraisal and an ex parte petition for distribution on Friday, but the filings were rejected. The clerk instructed that the documents must be submitted by mail.

The Court emphasized that if Linda Recchio wishes to remain as administrator, she must appear, at least via Zoom. The court continued the matter to May 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The court took the Order to Appear issued for today's hearing off calendar, and indicated that a new Order to Appear would be issued to administrator Linda Recchio for the May 14, 2025 hearing.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator Linda Recchio to appear on April 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
